allow: Bash(node -e "const sharp = require\('sharp'\); sharp\({ create: { width: 1, height: 1, channels: 3, background: {r:255,g:0,b:0} } }\).webp\(\).toBuffer\(\).then\(b => console.log\('sharp ok, size:', b.length\)\).catch\(e => console.error\('sharp error:', e.message\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const exifr = require\('exifr'\); console.log\('exifr ok:', typeof exifr.parse\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\)\); console.log\('Total artifacts:', d.length\); console.log\('With images:', d.filter\(a=>a.images?.length>0\).length\); console.log\('Sample IDs:', d.slice\(0,3\).map\(a=>a.id\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./data/artifacts.json'\); console.log\('Total:', d.length\); console.log\('With images:', d.filter\(a=>a.images?.length>0\).length\);")

Bash(node -e "const f=require\('./data/uploads.json'\); console.log\('total:', f.length\); const seen=new Set\(\); const dupes=[]; for \(const e of f\){ if\(seen.has\(e.src\)\) dupes.push\(e.src\); seen.add\(e.src\); } console.log\('uniq:',seen.size,'dupes:',dupes.length\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(f.slice\(0,2\), null, 2\)\);")
